hero.tagline: Senior direct response copywriter, creative strategist, and SEO specialist with 5 years of experience and over $10M in sales generated to date. I write high-converting copy that turns cold traffic into loyal customers for health, wellness and DTC brands. As an SEO strategist, I build AI-native content systems for local, national, and multi-location brands — driving rankings, conversions, and scalable growth across service-area businesses and eCommerce catalogs.

projects.title: DTC Health & Wellness Brand — Pain Relief / Compression Category
projects.description: Wrote ad copy, landing pages, and email sequences across top-performing channels. Paid Social drove $1.10M revenue at 47.69% session conversion rate; Direct landing pages drove $2.32M at 29.3% conversion.
projects.label: Case Study

detail.client: DTC Health & Wellness Brand (Pain Relief / Compression)
detail.overview: Owned conversion copy across the brand's full acquisition funnel — ad creative, landing pages, and email sequences — for a US-based DTC pain relief and compression product line. Worked across paid social, paid search, email, and direct landing-page traffic, producing copy that scaled past industry-average conversion benchmarks in a highly competitive YMYL category.
deliverables: Direct-response ad copy across Meta and TikTok
Long-form sales pages and pre-sale advertorials
Email lifecycle: welcome, browse-abandon, cart-abandon, post-purchase, win-back
Funnel-stage messaging architecture mapped to awareness levels (Schwartz)
Conversion-focused PDP and landing page rewrites
detail.approach: Built copy systems against documented customer voice (review mining + chat log analysis). Stress-tested messaging across awareness levels — problem-aware to solution-aware to product-aware — and structured pages around the most commercially-loaded query intent. Worked in tight feedback loops with paid media and design to optimize hooks weekly based on GA4 conversion data.
detail.samplesNote: Copywriting samples available upon request (redacted to protect client confidentiality).

projects.title: Local SEO for small-to-large businesses, single and multi-location.
projects.description: Full stack: GBP strategy, NAP consistency, local schema, review velocity, and city-page architecture that doesn't trip doorway penalties. SAB and brick-and-mortar across US clients.
projects.label: Case Study

projects.title: Scaling SEO across dozens of locations without cannibalization.
projects.description: Centralized content + schema framework with location-specific signals layered on top. Each location ranks for its own geo-modifier without competing with siblings.
projects.label: Case Study

projects.title: Category and product page systems that rank and convert.
projects.description: Technical architecture (faceted nav, Product/Review schema, PLP → PDP linking) stacked with conversion copy (benefit-led PDPs, A+ Content using A9 ranking factors).
projects.label: Case Study

projects.title: Writing content AI summarizers actually cite.
projects.description: Chunk-optimized passages, first-party data, expert quotes, structured FAQ for LLM ingestion. llms.txt, entity reinforcement, AI Overviews source tracking.
projects.label: Methodology

projects.title: Building the SEO research tools instead of just using them.
projects.description: Custom Semrush MCP server (Python / FastMCP) exposing 12 APIs to Claude as agent tools. Multi-step research runs as workflows instead of dashboard clicks.
projects.label: Project

process.title: From keyword to conversion — the 6-step system

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: VoC interviews, review mining (Amazon, Reddit, G2), competitor teardowns. Semrush MCP runs SERP + gap analysis in parallel.

steps.title: Cluster
steps.description: Keywords clustered by search intent — informational, commercial, transactional, navigational. Volume is secondary.

steps.title: Outline
steps.description: SERP-aligned: PAA coverage, entity checklist, competitor gaps, internal linking targets, schema spec, conversion goal.

steps.title: Write
steps.description: Schwartz awareness/sophistication hook, then Hook-Story-Offer or PAS body. First-party proof stacked throughout.

steps.title: Ship
steps.description: Structured data, internal linking equity, chunk-optimized passages for LLM citation, llms.txt where relevant.

steps.title: Maintain
steps.description: Monthly GSC query analysis, quarterly cannibalization audits, refresh cycles triggered by Core Updates and HCU rollouts.
